source_pr.title: planner: implementing multi index merge from CNF/DNF condition | tidb-test=pr/2229
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/47759

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
planner: implementing index merge from CNF condition
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: - GO111MODULE=on go build -race -o $tidb_server github.com/pingcap/tidb/tidb-server.

evidence: files: pkg/planner/cardinality/testdata/cardinality_suite_out.json, pkg/planner/core/casetest/index/BUILD.bazel, pkg/planner/core/casetest/index/index_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/index/testdata/integration_suite_in.json, pkg/planner/core/casetest/index/testdata/integration_suite_out.json, pkg/planner/core/indexmerge_path.go, pkg/planner/core/logical_plans.go, pkg/testkit/testdata/testdata.go, pkg/util/ranger/ranger_test.go, tests/integrationtest/run-tests.sh
